function_v0.doc:
Execute a flash-loan arbitrage.

All struct params (flash loan, requests, ops, sub-auths) are passed as
opaque `Val` to avoid embedding their type definitions in this WASM \xe2\x80\x94
they are forwarded as-is to the target contracts which own the types.

# Parameters
- `a` \xe2\x80\x94 Parallax contract address
- `b` \xe2\x80\x94 ops (`Vec<Op>`, opaque passthrough \xe2\x86\x92 parallax.a)
- `c` \xe2\x80\x94 Blend pool address
- `d` \xe2\x80\x94 flash loan params (`FlashLoan` struct, opaque passthrough \xe2\x86\x92 pool.flash_loan)
- `e` \xe2\x80\x94 Blend requests (`Vec<Request>`, opaque passthrough \xe2\x86\x92 pool.flash_loan)
- `f` \xe2\x80\x94 asset address (the token being traded, needed for approval + sweep)
- `g` \xe2\x80\x94 minimum profit (remaining balance after flash loan must be \xe2\x89\xa5 this)
- `h` \xe2\x80\x94 sub-auth entries (opaque passthrough \xe2\x86\x92 parallax.a)
function_v0.name: a
